content.full_text:
July 17, 1990

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION, LEGAL DEPARTMENT
428 J St., Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento Ca. 95804

Re: State Regulations Regarding Campaign Contributions by Corporations and Individuals

Dear Commission:

Enclosed is a summary of the state laws regarding the limits a corporation or an individual can contribute to a political campaign. Since we have had requests for this information, we would appreciate it if somebody in your office would look over the enclosed document to ensure that it is up to date and accurate.

If you could get us a report in the near future verifying its accuracy, we would then be able to release to the parties requesting this information.

Our address is: Murray & Associates
1781 Union Street
San Francisco Ca. 94123

Your kind assistance and courtesy in this matter will be most sincerely appreciated.

Very truly yours,

MURRAY & ASSOCIATES

[Signature]
CHRISTOPHER LAMERDIN
Law Clerk

CC1/amos
